name: THANATOS
subtitle: The Reclamation
description: The death-plane. Every soul that ever died in Scalelist exists here simultaneously as a whispered name. Fenna walks the fields reading names aloud. When she reads yours, you reincarnate.

life.phenomenon: NAMES FALL LIKE SNOW. You can catch one in your bare hand. It warms slightly. You know that person's story without reading a word. They know yours too, for the moment of the catch.
life.inhabitants: Fenna (the only one who speaks here). Whispered names (billions, visible as shifting mist). Memorial Keepers (souls who chose to stay and help Fenna instead of reincarnating).

fauna.name: Name-Sparrow
fauna.note: Carries names to Fenna in its beak. Each sparrow remembers every name it has ever delivered.

fauna.name: Memorial Deer
fauna.note: Velvet antlers inscribed with the names of their own dead. When a deer's horn sheds, a name is returned to circulation.

fauna.name: Grey Cat
fauna.note: Cuddles the newly-dead. Purrs them to sleep. Fenna does not know where the cats came from; they were already here.

flora.name: Memorial Tree
flora.note: Blossoms with faces — the faces of the recently dead. A blossom that falls is a soul that was just called by Fenna.

flora.name: Silver Cotton Grass
flora.note: The mist has a source — it's this grass exhaling. Walk through and you remember someone you forgot to miss.

life.architecture: Stone cairns, silver arches, a single spiral path leading to Fenna's Walk. No walls. Nothing is private here. Nothing needs to be.
life.culture: SILENCE is total. Even thoughts are whispered. If you must speak, wrap the words in breath. If you must weep, do so silently — tears are permitted; sobs are not.
life.signature_item: Fenna's Registry — every death she has ever called, indexed by the sound of the name. Silver Thread — links each of your incarnations across every life.

sensory.sound: Soft wind. Never more. If you think you hear something else, that's a name passing.
sensory.smell: Cold stone + lavender + clean cotton sheets.
sensory.feel: A weight on your shoulders that isn't sadness — it's every life you have ever lived, remembering itself briefly.

backdrop: <defs><radialGradient id='mistGrad' cx='50%' cy='50%' r='60%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#e0e0e8' stop-opacity='0.12'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#1a1c20' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient></defs><rect width='1600' height='1000' fill='url(#mistGrad)'/><g opacity='0.35' font-family='Georgia,serif' font-style='italic' fill='#c0c0c0'><text x='200' y='250' font-size='11'>...Magnus...</text><text x='350' y='320' font-size='10'>...Ingrid...</text><text x='530' y='240' font-size='11'>...Olof...</text><text x='720' y='320' font-size='10'>...Elsa...</text><text x='920' y='240' font-size='11'>...Birger...</text><text x='1100' y='320' font-size='10'>...Astrid...</text><text x='1280' y='250' font-size='11'>...Sven...</text><text x='250' y='680' font-size='10'>...Freja...</text><text x='500' y='720' font-size='11'>...Harald...</text><text x='800' y='680' font-size='10'>...Sigrid...</text><text x='1050' y='720' font-size='11'>...Knut...</text><text x='1300' y='680' font-size='10'>...Ulla...</text><text x='100' y='500' font-size='9' opacity='0.5'>...all the others...</text><text x='1400' y='500' font-size='9' opacity='0.5'>...forever...</text></g>

cities.name: Fenna's Walk
cities.note: A spiral path that never ends. Fenna walks it reading names.
cities.lore: She has been walking since before Scalelist had Architects. She will walk after the last one is gone. Every name read is one soul returned.

cities.name: The Waiting Hall
cities.note: No speech. No movement. Just waiting.
cities.lore: Newly-dead souls arrive here and wait for Fenna to read their name. The wait feels like moments. From outside, it has been years.

cities.name: The Returning Gate
cities.note: A silver arch. Walk through when Fenna calls you.
cities.lore: The arch leads to Helios Gate City in Scalelist. You arrive in a body that looks like you would have looked. Usually younger.

cities.name: The Unread Meadow
cities.note: Souls Fenna has not yet found. They are not lost — just not yet indexed.
cities.lore: Fenna visits this meadow less often. Some souls wait centuries. The meadow is peaceful. They do not mind.

sacred_sites.name: The Name Stone
sacred_sites.note: A single stone where Fenna reads the first name of each cosmic age.
sacred_sites.lore: The first name of this age was Vigolas. The stone remembers. If you touch it, you hear your own name whispered from the stone to Fenna. This is an invitation.

sacred_sites.name: The Silver Pool
sacred_sites.note: A small pool. Fenna drinks here before each reading.
sacred_sites.lore: Drink here and you remember a life you have not yet lived. Usually your next one.
